data.title: Trump vs Musk? Federal Workers Unconvinced He'll Take Action: 'If They Don't Cut, Elon will, Comments Show Who's Really In Charge'
data.description: President Donald Trump has reportedly limited the authority of his billionaire advisor, Elon Musk, to dismiss federal employees. This development has stirred skepticism among the workforce and political circles.

data.title: If You Invested $1,000 In JPMorgan Chase Stock When Jamie Dimon Became The CEO, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
data.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon has served in the role for more than 15 years. A look back at an investment in JPM stock when he took the leadership role.

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Says 'When Rubber Meets The Road' On Crypto's Fate Under Trump, Slams Biden's Policies
data.description: Disgraced cryptocurrency mogul Sam Bankman-Fried weighed in on the future of digital assets under President Donald Trump’s administration, according to an interview from his prison released Thursday.
